# VCSM → Traffic / TRAZE Funnel Audit

**Domain:** Traffic / TRAZE  
**System:** VCSM → Traze data funnel  
**Topic:** DB audit, field mapping, media gap analysis, data contract  
**Status:** Implemented — Phase 1–3 complete as of 2026-05-04  
**Generated by:** Session audit (main workflow)

---

## Scope

This document captures the full audit of the VCSM → Traffic/TRAZE discovery funnel.  
It covers every database object involved in provider cards, public menus, media, reviews, and how that data reaches Traze provider pages.

---

| File | Content |
|---|---|
| `_HISTORY/db/snapshots/full_schema.sql` | Complete schema — all tables, views, functions |
| `_HISTORY/db/migrations-archive/20260425013000_vport_business_card_and_leads.sql` | Business card RPC functions |
| `_HISTORY/db/snapshots/seeds/reviews_dimensions_seed.sql` | 385-row review dimension seed |

## Relevant DB Objects

### Public Views (Traze-accessible)

| View | Schema | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `vport.public_traze_profiles_v` | vport | Primary provider index — basis of all Traffic provider data |
| `vport.public_traze_services_v` | vport | Services per provider |
| `vport.public_provider_services_v` | vport | Service pricing with price_cents, duration_minutes |
| `vport.public_provider_details_v` | vport | Full contact details (not used by Traffic directly) |
| `vport.public_menu_read_model_v` | vport | Full menu with categories, items, image_url |
| `vport.public_traze_portfolio_v` | vport | **NEW (2026-05-04)** — public portfolio items with media |
| `reviews.public_vport_reviews_v` | reviews | Review list |
| `reviews.public_vport_review_summary_v` | reviews | Rating aggregate |
| `reviews.public_vport_review_dimensions_v` | reviews | Per-dimension ratings |

### Business Card RPC Functions (VCSM-internal)

| Function | Returns |
|---|---|
| `vport.read_business_card_public(slug)` | profile_id, actor_id, slug, business_name, bio, avatar_url, logo_url, phone_public, email_public, website_url, location_text, address, business_card_settings, review_count, average_rating, category_key, hours |
| `vport.get_business_card_sections(profile_id)` | JSON: services (with price+duration), portfolio (6 items), fuel_prices, amenities, rates |

### Key Tables

| Table | Schema | Key Fields for Traze |
|---|---|---|
| `vport.profiles` | vport | name, slug, avatar_url, banner_url, business_card_published, directory_visible, directory_status |
| `vport.profile_public_details` | vport | phone, email_public, website_url, booking_url, address, lat, lng, hours (jsonb), logo_url |
| `vport.menu_categories` | vport | key, name, description, sort_order |
| `vport.menu_items` | vport | name, description, price_cents, currency_code, **image_url** |
| `vport.menu_item_media` | vport | Multiple images per menu item (media_asset_id) |
| `vport.services` | vport | label, description, enabled, sort_order |
| `vport.service_booking_profiles` | vport | price_cents, currency_code, duration_minutes, booking_mode |
| `vport.portfolio_items` | vport | visibility, is_featured, cover_media_id |
| `vport.portfolio_media` | vport | url, media_role, alt_text |
| `platform.media_assets` | platform | scope_type: vport_avatar, vport_banner, portfolio_media, menu_item_photo |
| `traffic.price_aggregates` | traffic | P25/P50/P75 per city+service |
| `traffic.provider_stats_current` | traffic | rank_score, rating_avg, booking_count_30d |

## Business Card Data Map (VCSM)

| UI field | Code source | DB source | Fallback | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Business name | `vportBusinessCard.model.js:businessName` | `vport.profiles.name` | "VPORT" | Real |
| Avatar | `vportBusinessCard.model.js:avatarUrl` | `vport.profiles.avatar_url` | `/avatar.jpg` | Real |
| Logo | `vportBusinessCard.model.js:logoUrl` | `ppd.logo_url` | Falls to avatarUrl | Real |
| Bio | `vportBusinessCard.model.js:description` | `vport.profiles.bio` | `""` | Real |
| Location label | `vportBusinessCard.model.js:locationLabel` | `ppd.location_text` → `ppd.address` | composed | Real |
| Phone | `vportBusinessCard.model.js:phone` | `ppd.phone_public` | `""` | Real |
| Website | `vportBusinessCard.model.js:websiteUrl` | `ppd.website_url` | `""` | Real |
| Email | `vportBusinessCard.model.js:email` | `ppd.email_public` | `""` | Real |
| Hours | `VportBusinessCardPublic.view.jsx:card.hours` | `ppd.hours` (jsonb) | null | Real |
| Review count | `vportBusinessCard.model.js:reviewCount` | `read_business_card_public` aggregate | 0 | Real |
| Services with price | `ServicesSection` via `get_business_card_sections` | `vport.services + service_booking_profiles` | `[]` | Real |
| Portfolio gallery | `PortfolioSection` via `get_business_card_sections` | `vport.portfolio_items + portfolio_media` | `[]` | Real |
| **Menu** | `MenuSection` in `businessCardPrimarySection.jsx:74` | **LINK ONLY** → external URL | — | NOT rendered inline in VCSM |
| Category key | `vportBusinessCard.model.js:categoryKey` | `vport.profile_categories` (is_primary=true) | null | Real |
| TRAZE listing active | `vportBusinessCard.model.js:isTrazeListingActive` | `directory_visible AND directory_status='listed'` | false | Real |

## Traffic Provider Page Data Map

### Pre-2026-05-04 (before this audit's implementation)

| UI field | DB source | Status |
|---|---|---|
| displayName | `vport.profiles.name` | Real |
| avatarUrl | `vport.profiles.avatar_url` | Real |
| bannerUrl | `vport.profiles.banner_url` | Real |
| shortBio | `vport.profiles.bio` | FAKE when bio empty (synthetic fallback) |
| phone | `ppd.phone_public` via `public_traze_profiles_v` | Real |
| address / locationText | `ppd.address`, `ppd.location_text` | Real |
| city | `vport.cities` (structured) | Real |
| rating / review count | `reviews.public_vport_review_summary_v` | Real |
| reviews list | `reviews.public_vport_reviews_v` | Real |
| rankScore | computed from profile signals (post-fix) | Real |
| **logo_url** | — | MISSING |
| **hours** | — | MISSING |
| **website / email** | — | MISSING |
| **lat / lng** | — | MISSING |
| **booking_url** | — | MISSING |
| **service menu with prices** | — | MISSING |
| **menu items / food menu** | — | MISSING |
| **gallery / portfolio** | — | MISSING |

### Post-2026-05-04 (after implementation)

All previously missing fields are now wired. See implementation section.

---

## Public Menu Flow

```
vport.menu_categories
  ↓ JOIN
vport.menu_items (has price_cents, currency_code, image_url)
  ↓ exposed via
vport.public_menu_read_model_v
  ↓ queried by
apps/Traffic/src/data/dal/providerProfile.read.dal.js → fetchProviderMenu(profileId)
  ↓ grouped by category
ProviderPageTemplate.jsx → MenuSection
```

**Menu items support pictures.** `menu_items.image_url` is a URL string on the row.  
`vport.menu_item_media` holds additional images per item via `platform.media_assets`.

---

## Media / Picture Gap Analysis

| Media type | DB location | Exposed to Traffic (before) | Status after |
|---|---|---|---|
| Provider avatar | `vport.profiles.avatar_url` | YES | Unchanged |
| Provider banner | `vport.profiles.banner_url` | YES | Unchanged |
| Provider logo | `ppd.logo_url` | NO | Added to view + mapped |
| Portfolio images | `vport.portfolio_media.url` | NO | New view + DAL |
| Menu item primary image | `vport.menu_items.image_url` | NO | New DAL |
| Menu item gallery | `vport.menu_item_media.url` | NO | Deferred (low priority) |

---

## Schema Changes (2026-05-04)

Migration: `20260504120000_extend_traze_views.sql`

### 1. `vport.public_traze_profiles_v` — extended

Added from `vport.profile_public_details`:
- `logo_url`
- `email_public`
- `website_url`
- `booking_url`
- `hours` (jsonb)
- `lat`
- `lng`

### 2. `vport.public_traze_portfolio_v` — new

Exposes public portfolio items with cover image media for Traffic.

Columns: `profile_id`, `portfolio_item_id`, `title`, `portfolio_kind`, `is_featured`, `media_url`, `media_role`, `alt_text`, `sort_order`

Filter: `visibility = 'public' AND is_active = true AND is_deleted = false`

---

## Traffic Code Changes (2026-05-04)

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `src/data/dal/vportDataset.read.dal.js` | Added 7 new fields to SELECT projection |
| `src/data/mappers/vportToProvider.model.js` | Mapped logoUrl, email, websiteUrl, bookingUrl, hours, lat, lng |
| `src/data/types.js` | Extended Provider typedef |
| `src/data/dal/providerProfile.read.dal.js` | Added fetchProviderMenu + fetchProviderPortfolio |
| `src/app/(seo)/pro/[providerSlug]/page.jsx` | Parallel fetch menu + portfolio + live services |
| `src/features/providers/templates/ProviderPageTemplate.jsx` | Added HoursSection, ServicesSection, MenuSection, GallerySection |
| `src/features/providers/components/ContactSection.jsx` | Added email, website, booking, directions links |
| `src/app/globals.css` | Added CSS for new provider page sections |

---

## Traze Data Contract (production-ready)

```js
// Provider shape after full funnel implementation
{
  // Identity
  id: string,
  actorId: string | null,
  slug: string,
  displayName: string,
  claimStatus: "claimed" | "unclaimed",

  // Media
  avatarUrl: string | null,
  bannerUrl: string | null,
  logoUrl: string | null,           // from ppd.logo_url
  portfolio: Array<{
    mediaUrl: string,
    role: "cover"|"before"|"after"|"result"|"detail",
    altText: string | null,
    isFeatured: boolean
  }>,

  // Description
  shortBio: string | null,          // null if synthetic
  categoryKey: string | null,

  // Location
  locationText: string | null,
  addressLine1: string | null,
  postalCode: string | null,
  cityName: string | null,
  citySlug: string | null,
  regionCode: string | null,
  countryCode: string,
  lat: number | null,               // from ppd.lat
  lng: number | null,               // from ppd.lng

  // Contact
  phoneE164: string | null,
  email: string | null,             // from ppd.email_public
  websiteUrl: string | null,        // from ppd.website_url
  bookingUrl: string | null,        // from ppd.booking_url

  // Hours
  hours: {
    monday: { open: "HH:MM", close: "HH:MM" } | { closed: true } | null,
    // tuesday through sunday same shape
  } | null,                         // from ppd.hours

  // Services (live from Supabase at build time)
  services: Array<{
    key: string,
    label: string,
    description: string | null,
    booking: {
      priceCents: number | null,
      currencyCode: string | null,
      durationMinutes: number | null,
      isBookable: boolean
    } | null
  }>,

  // Menu (live from Supabase at build time)
  menu: Array<{
    key: string,
    name: string,
    items: Array<{
      key: string,
      name: string,
      description: string | null,
      priceCents: number | null,
      currencyCode: string | null,
      imageUrl: string | null
    }>
  }>,

  // Reviews (live from Supabase at build time)
  ratingAvg: number | null,
  reviewCount: number,

  // Rankings
  rankScore: number,

  // Deep links
  vcsmProfileUrl: string,
  vcsmBookingUrl: string | null,
  trazeProfileUrl: string
}
```

---

## Remaining Blockers

1. **SQL migration must be applied to Supabase** before `public_traze_portfolio_v` queries succeed.  
   Until then, `fetchProviderPortfolio` silently returns `[]` (fail-safe).

2. **PNG icons needed for PWA** — `public/icons/icon-192.png` and `public/icons/icon-512.png` must be created.  
   Chrome requires at least one PNG icon for full installability.

3. **`traffic.price_aggregates` DB table** exists in schema but has no pipeline to populate it.  
   Traffic computes price percentiles at build time from `vport.public_provider_services_v` data.

4. **Menu item gallery** (`vport.menu_item_media`) is not exposed to Traffic.  
   Only the primary `image_url` on `menu_items` row is used. Multiple-image gallery deferred.

5. **"Open now" indicator** is not shown on hours because Traffic is a static build.  
   Requires a client component that reads `Date()` in the browser. Deferred.

6. **`traffic.provider_stats_current` DB table** is not wired to Traffic's `rankScore`.  
   Traffic computes `rankScore` from profile signals at build time. The DB table is available for future server-side ranking.

---

## Data Flow (final)

```
VCSM Supabase
  vport.public_traze_profiles_v       (extended: +logo_url, email, website, booking, hours, lat, lng)
  vport.public_traze_portfolio_v      (new: public portfolio items)
  vport.public_menu_read_model_v      (existing: full menu with images)
  vport.public_provider_services_v    (existing: services with prices)
  reviews.public_vport_review_*       (existing: reviews + summaries)
        ↓ at Next.js build time
apps/Traffic DAL layer
  vportDataset.read.dal.js            (profile index load)
  providerProfile.read.dal.js         (per-provider: services, menu, portfolio, reviews)
        ↓ mapped + shaped
  vportToProvider.model.js            (Provider shape)
  unifiedDataset.js                   (MOCK_PROVIDERS, price aggregates)
        ↓ per provider page render
  pro/[providerSlug]/page.jsx         (parallel fetch all per-provider data)
        ↓ rendered to static HTML
ProviderPageTemplate.jsx
  HoursSection     ← hours jsonb
  ServicesSection  ← fetchProviderServices
  MenuSection      ← fetchProviderMenu
  GallerySection   ← fetchProviderPortfolio
  ContactSection   ← phone, email, website, booking, directions (lat/lng)
        ↓ deployed
traze.vibezcitizens.com/pro/[slug]    (rich SEO provider page)
```
